catalogData.name: Deception
properties: Unphased (can't gain Frightened or Wounded status)

powers.name: Animal Form
powers.raw: Animal Form (Major Action, Sustained): Change into animal totem. Retain stats, but can't use attacks/powers.
powers.text: Change into animal totem. Retain stats, but can't use attacks/powers.

powers.name: Change Appearance
powers.raw: Change Appearance (Complex Action): Cast Disguise on self at Force. Doesn't count towards limit of 1 sustained power.
powers.text: Cast Disguise on self at Force. Doesn't count towards limit of 1 sustained power.

powers.name: Decoy
powers.raw: Decoy (Complex Action, Sustained): Create illusory duplicate of target, which may fool attackers to target it instead. Resist: WIL+LOG
powers.text: Create illusory duplicate of target, which may fool attackers to target it instead. Resist: WIL+LOG

powers.name: Primary Spell
powers.raw: Primary Spell (Complex Action, Sustained): Cast Disguise at Force

powers.name: Skill Guidance
powers.raw: Skill Guidance (Complex Action, Sustained): Target gains +2 augmentation bonus to Con if unaugmented skill ≤ Force
powers.text: Target gains +2 augmentation bonus to Con if unaugmented skill ≤ Force

powers.name: Use Mysticism
powers.raw: Use Mysticism (No Action): Spirit can use Mask power of Aura Manipulation to disguise magical effects
powers.text: Spirit can use Mask power of Aura Manipulation to disguise magical effects

powers.name: Veneer
powers.raw: Veneer (Complex Action, Sustained 1 hour): Lightly disguise (Force) targets with same disguise. Resist: WIL+INT
powers.text: Lightly disguise (Force) targets with same disguise. Resist: WIL+INT

greatFormPowers.name: Sow Chaos
greatFormPowers.raw: Sow Chaos (No Action): Cast Chaos at Force without using action 1/Action Phase
greatFormPowers.text: Cast Chaos at Force without using action 1/Action Phase
